# Built to Rank
> Web design and local SEO for trades businesses.
> Founder: Arjan Dhillon
> Services: Website Design, SEO Setup, Monthly Retainer
> Location: Brampton, Ontario, Canada
> Site: https://builttorank.ca
> Contact: info@builttorank.ca | 647-657-8525

## About
Built to Rank builds fully custom websites for trades businesses and sets them up for local search from day one. No templates. No agency layers. Direct access to the developer.

## Services
- Website Design & Development: Custom, mobile-first websites with a clear launch timeline before work starts. Starting from $599 CAD.
- SEO Setup & Optimization: Schema markup, sitemap, Google Business Profile guidance, on-page keyword optimization. Starting from $799 CAD (bundled with website).
- Monthly Retainer: Ongoing updates, SEO monitoring, priority support. Starting from $299/mo CAD.

## Who We Work With
Plumbers, roofers, landscapers, HVAC contractors, painters, excavators, and general contractors in Brampton, Mississauga, Caledon, Bolton, Vaughan, and across the GTA.
